name: figma
summary: Read Figma files, frames, and design variables through Figma MCP.
description: Connect Artyx to Figma MCP for design inspection, frame reading, component context, and variable discovery.
notes: Verify Figma's remote MCP auth mode (OAuth vs bearer token) and the exact URL against Figma's official MCP docs before removing `experimental`.

companion.title: Figma
companion.summary: Authorize Figma and enable its MCP server.
steps: In Figma, enable the MCP / Dev Mode MCP server if required by your plan.
Click Sign in and authorize when prompted.
